name: backliner-helper
description: Minimal executable backbone for shared-CDP backlink submission workflows.

scripts.start-browser: corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/index.js start-browser
scripts.preflight: corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/index.js preflight
scripts.ensure-openclaw-cron: corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/index.js ensure-openclaw-cron
scripts.enqueue-site: corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/index.js enqueue-site
scripts.guarded-drain-status: corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/index.js guarded-drain-status
scripts.mailbox-triage: corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/index.js mailbox-triage
scripts.missing-input-preflight: corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/index.js missing-input-preflight
scripts.claim-next-task: corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/index.js claim-next-task
scripts.task-prepare: corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/index.js task-prepare
scripts.task-record-agent-trace: corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/index.js task-record-agent-trace
scripts.task-finalize: corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/index.js task-finalize
scripts.run-next: corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/index.js run-next
scripts.repartition-retry-decisions: corepack pnpm build && node dist/cli/index.js repartition-retry-decisions
